title: Resolution Authorizing the Honorable Mayor Caesar P. Perez to Revert the Allowable Maintenance and Other Operations Expense (MOOE) Allotment for Y 2019 Amounting to Five Million Three Hundred Seventeen Thousand Four Hundred Pesos (P5, 317,400.00) to Other Benefits for the Payment of Collective Negotiation Agreement (CNA) Incentive. (AUTHOR: HON. GERONIMO A. CICERON, 02/14/20)
